text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation and quiet—the stark, angular lines and cool colors invoke a pause for reflection, as if I'm between destinations in a liminal space. In the second scene, surrounded by the energetic patterns and bold text of the exhibition, I'm enlivened and curious, pulled forward by humanity's perpetual drive to innovate and understand. The contrast between emptiness and intellectual buzz makes me ponder the relationship between silence and discovery; I feel both present and in motion.
